title: Creamy Irish Lamb Casserole
description: A hearty and flavorful Irish dish featuring lamb, massaman paste, and lacquer glaze, made diabetic-friendly with careful ingredient selection. This recipe is designed for meal prep and can be cooked to perfection in a raclette grill.
instructions: Preheat the raclette grill to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, whisk together massaman paste, lacquer glaze, salt, and black pepper.
Add the lamb cubes to the bowl and toss to coat with the paste mixture.
In a separate bowl, combine the chopped onion, sliced carrots, and sliced potatoes.
Add the low-fat cream to the bowl with the onion mixture and stir to combine.
Add the cream mixture to the lamb mixture and stir gently to combine.
Transfer the mixture to a raclette grill-safe dish and cook for 45 minutes.
Sprinkle the chopped parsley over the top of the casserole and cook for an additional 10 minutes.
Remove the casserole from the grill and let it rest for 10 minutes before serving.
Serve the casserole hot, garnished with additional parsley if desired.
